name: AWS IAM SSH Public Key Deletion Activity
description: Deleting an SSH public key associated with an IAM user indicates that the key is no longer valid for authentication. This might be part of regular key management practices or an effort to clean up unused keys, and while it's normal, it should be monitored to ensure it's done properly as part of routine security measures.

rules.name: AWS IAM SSH Public Key Deletion Activity

author: Sunil Bharti & David Agni
